text: As I stand in these bright, modern halls, surrounded by glass and reflective surfaces, I feel small and slightly disoriented—everything leans at an angle, hinting at unfamiliarity and transition. Yet, moving closer to the vibrant R+D wall, the colors and interactive displays energize me. I’m curious, intrigued by the potential of human creativity and the promises of innovation. Here, I sense the merging of intellect and possibility—an invitation to engage, learn, and contemplate our coexistence with intelligent machines.
